hooks.command: echo "Company pipeline loaded. 12 agents: CPO (Marcus), CDO (Yuki), CTO (Dr. Nakamura), CIO (Dr. Mehta), CSO (Dr. Chen), CHRO (Dr. Hartwell), CTO-L (Dr. Osei-Mensah), Software Architect (Rafael), Test Lead (Priscilla), Android Lead (Kofi), iOS Lead (Seo-Yeon), Cross-Platform Lead (Mei-Ling). Pipeline: 10 stages. Use /company-pipeline for full reference."

echo "Context compacted. Pipeline reminder: 10 stages, sequential gate criteria. C-suite: CPO (Marcus), CDO (Yuki), CTO (Dr. Nakamura), CIO (Dr. Mehta), CSO (Dr. Chen), CHRO (Dr. Hartwell), CTO-L (Dr. Osei-Mensah). Rules: P0/P1 defects block release non-negotiably. echo "[Subagent dispatch] Verify the subagent matches the current pipeline stage before proceeding."
